channel.name: store_expansion
channel.header: Discussions related to new store openings and expansions
channel.purpose: Planning and tracking of new store openings

channel.name: customer_feedback_new_stores
channel.header: Collecting and discussing customer feedback from new stores
channel.purpose: Understanding customer experience at newly opened stores

post.message: We've been receiving some great feedback about the new organic produce section in our stores. Customers really appreciate the variety.
Just a reminder that we have a meeting scheduled next week to discuss the layout plans for the upcoming store remodels.
That's great to hear Mary. Can we also check on the feedback on our new self-checkout systems?
John, can we also discuss the allocation of resources for staff training in the new stores during the meeting?
Sure, Janet. I'll compile the feedback about the self-checkout systems and share it with the team before our next call.
Definitely, Janet. I'll make sure to add that to the agenda.
Thanks, Mary. Getting customer feedback on the new technologies we're implementing is crucial for our success.
I agree, Janet. Staff training should be a priority as we continue to expand and improve our stores.

Hello team, just wanted to share an update on our store expansion progress. I am pleased to report that during the period of 2024-2025, we successfully opened 6 new Lee's Market stores across the U.S. and Canada. This is a significant step forward in our geographic growth strategy. Looking forward to continued expansion in the coming years.
